misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu, a competitor who engaged with the Hector Trophée on three separate occasions, has concluded his active participation in Hector events. His appearances in this distinctive pair competition included a significant achievement that secures his place within its historical record.

Across his limited yet impactful tournament history, Panu and his partner claimed the prestigious Hector Trophée once, demonstrating a commendable aptitude for the team format. The singular honor of the Victor Trophy for the top individual player, however, was not among his accolades.

Panu's distinctive playing style was marked by an extended and deliberate consideration of each shot, a methodical approach that underscored his commitment to precision. While his presence will not be seen at the Hector Trophée 2026, his strategic contribution and one victorious campaign remain a noteworthy chapter in the tournament's unfolding narrative.
